description: parseInt-coerced request parameter flows into innerHTML attribute context. The value is provably TypeKind::Int (parseInt) with a bounded interval (only reachable decimal digits), so HTML_ESCAPE suppression should fire for both the text and attribute contexts. No taint-unsanitised-flow expected.

expected.notes: parseInt return is Int-typed; Int value cannot carry HTML metacharacters (<, >, ", ', &, /, :) in text or attribute context — HTML_ESCAPE sink must be suppressed
